---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Dyad
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 💡 Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📋 Detailed Requirements

### Functional Requirements
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

### Non-Functional Requirements
- [ ] Performance considerations
- [ ] Security requirements
- [ ] Accessibility needs
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness

## 🎨 User Experience

### User Stories
As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

**Example:**
- As a developer, I want to save code snippets so that I can reuse them across projects.

### User Flow
1. User navigates to...
2. User clicks on...
3. System displays...
4. User completes action...

## 🖼️ Mockups/Wireframes
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or sketches to help explain your feature.

## 🏗️ Technical Considerations

### Implementation Approach
- **Frontend Changes:** Describe UI/UX changes needed
- **Backend Changes:** Describe API or server changes needed
- **Database Changes:** Describe any schema modifications
- **Third-party Integrations:** List any external services needed

### Complexity Assessment
- [ ] Simple (1-2 days)
- [ ] Medium (3-5 days)
- [ ] Complex (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Major (2+ weeks)

### Dependencies
- Depends on feature/issue #[number]
- Requires integration with [service/library]
- Needs design system updates

## 📊 Success Metrics
How will we measure the success of this feature?
- [ ] User engagement metrics
- [ ] Performance improvements
- [ ] Error rate reduction
- [ ] User feedback scores

## 🔍 Acceptance Criteria
Define the criteria that must be met for this feature to be considered complete:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added for feature
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Accessibility requirements met

## 🎯 Priority Level
- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (important for next release)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have soon)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## 👥 Target Users
Who will benefit from this feature?
- [ ] New developers
- [ ] Experienced developers
- [ ] AI/ML developers
- [ ] Open source contributors
- [ ] Enterprise users

## 🔗 Related Resources
- Link to relevant documentation
- Similar features in other tools
- Research or articles supporting this feature
- Community discussions

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, research, or screenshots about the feature request here.

---

**Community Input:**
- Would you be interested in implementing this feature? [ ] Yes [ ] No
- Are you available to help with testing? [ ] Yes [ ] No
- Do you have domain expertise in this area? [ ] Yes [ ] No

**Maintainer Notes:**
- [ ] Feature aligns with project roadmap
- [ ] Technical feasibility confirmed
- [ ] Design review needed
- [ ] Breaking changes assessment required
